since_last: 64% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.40%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.86% · BTC +1.76% · Gold +1.94% · Nasdaq100 +1.83%. 64% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.40%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.40%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CBRS is the standout at +17.40%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.52% at $122.87
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
